plain.en: O God, Father of all nations, who spread your Chgurch among the peoples of Africa through the apostolic zeal of Saint Daniel, your bishop; grant we beseech you, through his intercession, that she may grow in faith and holiness, and be increasingly enriched with new children, to the glory of your Name. Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son, who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit, one God, for ever and ever.

en.text: O God, Father of all nations,
who spread your Chgurch among the peoples of Africa
through the apostolic zeal of Saint Daniel, your bishop;
grant we beseech you, through his intercession,
that she may grow in faith and holiness,
and be increasingly enriched with new children,
to the glory of your Name.
Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son,
who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit,
one God, for ever and ever.

plain.en: Lord, may these gifts we offer you in memory of Saint Daniel be aceptable to you; given life by the Holy Spirit, may they be a source of redemption and of peace. Through Christ our Lord.

en.text: Lord, may these gifts we offer you
in memory of Saint Daniel
be aceptable to you;
given life by the Holy Spirit,
may they be a source of redemption and of peace.
Through Christ our Lord.

plain.en: Lord, may the holy mysteries we have received bring us the wisdom of the Cross which gave strength to the life of Saint Daniel, so that we may work generously within the Church for the life of the world. Through Christ our Lord.

en.text: Lord, may the holy mysteries we have received
bring us the wisdom of the Cross
which gave strength to the life of Saint Daniel,
so that we may work generously within the Church
for the life of the world.
Through Christ our Lord.
